command.vbs.backup.legacy-create.descrip: Create a volume backup through the legacy API. This is a legacy API that may be retired according to actual usage; use the newer API version, which is more consistent and covers more scenarios.
command.vbs.backup.legacy-delete.descrip: Delete a volume backup through the legacy API. This is a legacy API that may be retired according to actual usage; use the newer API version, which is more consistent and covers more scenarios.
command.vbs.backup.legacy-list.descripti: List volume backups through the legacy API. This is a legacy API that may be retired according to actual usage; use the newer API version, which is more consistent and covers more scenarios.
command.vbs.backup.legacy-restore.descri: Restore a volume backup through the legacy API. This is a legacy API that may be retired according to actual usage; use the newer API version, which is more consistent and covers more scenarios.
command.vbs.backup.legacy-show.descripti: Retrieve a volume backup through the legacy API. This is a legacy API that may be retired according to actual usage; use the newer API version, which is more consistent and covers more scenarios.
command.vbs.backup.legacy-usage.descript: Retrieve volume-backup storage usage through the legacy API. This is a legacy API that may be retired according to actual usage; use the newer API version, which is more consistent and covers more scenarios.
command.vbs.backup.usage.description: Retrieve a volume backup's storage usage.
command.vbs.policy.bind-repository.descr: Bind volume-backup policies to a repository.
command.vbs.policy.bind-volumes.descript: Bind volumes to a volume-backup policy.
command.vbs.policy.delete.description: Delete one or more volume-backup policies.
command.vbs.policy.legacy-bind-volumes.d: Bind volumes to a volume-backup policy through the legacy API. This is a legacy API that may be retired according to actual usage; use the newer API version, which is more consistent and covers more scenarios.
command.vbs.policy.legacy-list.descripti: List volume-backup policies through the legacy API. This is a legacy API that may be retired according to actual usage; use the newer API version, which is more consistent and covers more scenarios.
command.vbs.policy.legacy-unbind-volumes: Unbind volumes from a volume-backup policy through the legacy API. This is a legacy API that may be retired according to actual usage; use the newer API version, which is more consistent and covers more scenarios.
command.vbs.policy.list-tasks.descriptio: List tasks created by a volume-backup policy.
command.vbs.policy.list-volumes.descript: List volumes bound to a volume-backup policy.
command.vbs.policy.unbind-repository.des: Unbind volume-backup policies from a repository.
command.vbs.policy.unbind-volumes.descri: Unbind volumes from a volume-backup policy.
command.vbs.repository.legacy-list.descr: List volume-backup repositories through the legacy API. This is a legacy API that may be retired according to actual usage; use the newer API version, which is more consistent and covers more scenarios.

parameter.vbs.policy.create.adv_retentio: Advanced retention-policy configuration used when advanced retention is enabled.
Whether advanced retention is enabled; default is false.
parameter.vbs.policy.create.cycle_day.de: Backup interval in days; used only when cycle type is day.
parameter.vbs.policy.create.cycle_type.d: Backup cycle type: day or week.
parameter.vbs.policy.create.cycle_week.d: Comma-separated weekdays from 0 (Sunday) to 6 (Saturday) when the cycle type is week.
parameter.vbs.policy.create.full_backup_: Periodic full-backup interval from -1 to 100; default is -1, 0 makes every backup full, and a positive value makes one full backup after that many incremental backups.
parameter.vbs.policy.create.region.descr: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.vbs.policy.create.remain_first: Whether to retain each month's first backup; default is false and valid with count-based retention, except when the retention count is 1.
parameter.vbs.policy.create.retention_da: Retention period from 1 to 99999 days; used only when retention type is date.
parameter.vbs.policy.create.retention_nu: Retention count from 1 to 99999; used only when retention type is num.
parameter.vbs.policy.create.retention_ty: Retention type: num for count-based retention, date for time-based retention, or all to retain every backup.
parameter.vbs.policy.create.status.descr: Initial policy state: 0 for disabled or 1 for enabled; default is 0.
parameter.vbs.policy.delete.region.descr: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.vbs.policy.disable.region.desc: Region ID used to scope the request.

parameter.vbs.repository.create.auto_ren: Automatic renewal state: 0 for disabled or 1 for enabled; default is 0 and applies only to subscriptions.
